message:
refactor(codegen): Add helpers for repeated emit patterns in method_calls and assertions

- Add emitBoolToInt helper in method_calls.zig for @as(i64, @intFromBool(...)) pattern
- Add emitBigVariantSuffix helper in assertions.zig for float Big variant error handling
- Add emitFloatMethodBlock helper to consolidate float method inline block generation
- Replace duplicate code with helper calls
